description: Browserbase is a platform for building and running browser-based AI agents and web automation. It provides hosted browser sessions plus related primitives such as search, fetch, functions, identity, and model access.
summary: Browserbase exposes a REST API at `https://api.browserbase.com/v1`, a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.browserbase.com/mcp`, and a `browse` npm CLI; all use a Browserbase API key.
